extortion.description: As a private, post-secondary institution, Jersey College strives to provide its students with an education that will help them thrive in the field of nursing. The core of the program focuses on the skills and knowledge of a Certified Nurse Assistant and provides potential nurses the opportunity to become a License Practical Nurse or continue on to become a Registered Nurse. Our mission is to bridge the labor gap that has been observed in fields such as nursing and to prepare professionals that will be skilled and ready to join the job forces.
